message:
fix(diagram-layout): harden resolve_node and compute_ports against out-of-bounds IR

Make resolve_node return Option<usize> with bounds validation instead of
blindly indexing. Skip self-loop edges in build_adj_from_ir and
out-of-bounds port references in compute_ports. Apply the same bounds
checks in route_edges_simple. Prevents index-out-of-bounds panics when
diagram IR contains stale or malformed node/port references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
